name: Post-Layoff Pivot & Identity Recovery Coaching
description: Graduates with specialized degrees (Design, Public Relations, STEM) are finding their skills rendered obsolete by AI or market saturation. Some got 'lucky' once with high pay but lack the formal credentials to re-enter their field after a layoff, forcing them into manual labor jobs like landscaping/warehousing.
pain_points: AI eating entry-level creative work portfolios
Degree inflation making pivot impossible without a CS degree
Severe emotional trauma and identity loss after 'falling' from a white-collar to blue-collar role
tech_stack: OpenAI API (Custom embeddings for skill mapping)
